history_files.reason: Rejected because a large wall mark and shield motifs could be misread as a newly designed Northern emblem.
Superseded four-template version; retained for audit after user clarified that all eight siege troop templates are required.

notes: Board includes all eight templates: Blackfang breach axeman, Ironhorn shield-wall soldier, White-mane snow wolf rider, Snowbadger tunnel sapper, Greyskin siege-towing troll, Snowfeather wall-climber scout, Frosthoof dream-flute ritual soldier, and Redmane overseer cavalry.
Final version avoids large wall, shield, banner, or chest emblem redesigns; faction continuity is limited to small material language and physical equipment details.
No background Codex thread was launched because this was a single supervised asset generated directly in the parent thread.
